MOORE
SOME EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL STOP WORKING EFFECTIVELY AROUND THE LATE 2020S OR EARLY 2030S DUE TO PHYSICAL LIMITATIONS IN TRANSISTOR MINIATURIZATION AND HEAT DISSIPATION CHALLENGES.
***
ALTERNATIVELY, OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL NOT TRULY END BUT WILL EVOLVE AS NEW MATERIALS AND ARCHITECTURES LIKE QUANTUM COMPUTING TAKE OVER TO SUSTAIN THE TREND OF INCREASING PROCESSING POWER.
MOORE
